name: Depreciation & TCO Calculator
metaTitle: Car & Vehicle Depreciation Calculator — Real TCO, 80EEB, WDV | c7xai
metaDescription: See the true cost of owning a car, bike, or commercial vehicle after depreciation (15% WDV), fuel inflation, insurance, maintenance, and Section 80EEB EV deduction.
shortDescription: Real cost of vehicle ownership after all hidden costs

faq.question: What is WDV depreciation for vehicles?
faq.answer: Under the Income Tax Act, vehicles are depreciated at 15% per year on the Written Down Value (WDV) basis. This means each year you deduct 15% from the remaining book value.

faq.question: What is Section 80EEB for EVs?
faq.answer: Section 80EEB provides a deduction of up to ₹1.5L per year on interest paid on EV loans, if your annual income is ₹50L or less. This can save up to ₹45,000 in tax per year.

faq.question: What is the true cost of owning a car?
faq.answer: A ₹10L car typically costs ₹18-22L over 8 years when you add fuel (with 8% annual inflation), insurance, maintenance, registration, and loan interest. The resale value is often only 20-25% of the purchase price.
